race.comment: Open race with plenty of chances. BETTER BLOOM (5) progressive filly who brings a solid set of figures here at her third race start. Sat just off the speed when a fast finishing third over 1200m at this track. Distance suits and should be able to overcome the sticky gate. ARCTIC BRIGHT (9) chipped away late at her first run back with a respectable fourth over 1300m at Canberra. Another drawn out with the upside to take a hand in the finish. FORCE MARCH (2) solid debut when made up good ground late to finish third over 1200m at Wyong. Will appreciate this roomier track and the extra distance. Leading player with the claim. ZOUSARI (4) gets one more chance from the better gate after disappointing in his last three runs.
